   "reasoning": "I'm scared that if the school doesn't get more funding, I'll be the one to suffer - my family can't afford to pay for my education on their own, and I desperately need that scholarship to stay in school. I want the school to fight for kids like me, so I'm recommending a strong focus on student scholarships and counseling programs. I don't really see how transparency reports will help me or my family, so I'm not prioritizing that.",

}
